summary: Income tax return filing is incomplete without e-verification. Here are five quick ways to verify your ITR within 30 days, avoid your return being treated as invalid and ensure faster processing and tax refunds before the filing deadline.

title: ITAT Mumbai allows Section 87A rebate on STCG: Here’s what taxpayers need to know
summary: ITAT Mumbai has allowed a taxpayer to claim the Section 87A rebate on tax payable on short-term capital gains for AY 2024-25. The ruling clarifies that the rebate cannot be denied for STCG when the law applicable for that year did not specifically restrict such benefit.

summary: CKYC number is a 14-digit identifier that simplifies KYC verification for banks and financial institutions. Here's how CKYC works, its benefits, ways to find your number and why it helps make financial transactions faster and safer.

title: Decoding crypto tax notices: Expert explains different notice types, penalties, how taxpayers should respond
summary: Ignoring a crypto tax notice can lead to reassessment, penalties or even prosecution in some cases. Timely reconciliation of records and responding within the prescribed deadline can help investors avoid unnecessary tax disputes.

summary: NaBFID’s ₹20,000 crore zero-coupon bonds offer investors a 10-year fixed-income option with no regular interest payouts. Here are the issue price, maturity value, expected returns, taxation rules and key factors to consider before investing in these infrastructure-focused bonds.

title: 8th Pay Commission talks gain momentum as fitment factor hinges on fiscal realities
summary: 8th Pay Commission: Fitment factor remains the biggest concern for central government employees and pensioners. Final recommendations are expected by mid-2027, and fiscal sustainability will influence revisions to salaries and pensions.

summary: The Employees' Provident Fund offers a secure retirement savings option for Indian salaried individuals offering an 8.25% interest rate for FY26. Here's how EPF subscribers can retrieve their UAN via the EPFO portal or Umang app.

title: Only 4 value mutual funds delivered double-digit returns in one year. Here's why experts aren't worried

title: Profit up 35%, shares down 15%: What went wrong at Bandhan Bank?
summary: Bandhan Bank shares hit the 15% lower circuit despite a 35% jump in Q1 profit, as investors focused on the lender's sharp cut to its FY27 RoA guidance. Brokerages remained divided, with concerns over margin pressure and funding costs overshadowing stronger earnings and improved asset quality.

title: BlueStone Jewellery shares soar 29% in 2 days after stellar Q1 show. Should you buy, sell or hold the stock?

While Systematix reiterated its Buy rating with a target price of Rs 832, investors are assessing whether the rally has more room to run.

title: Triveni Engineering shares adjust 38.5% as stock turns ex-demerger. What lies ahead for 95,000 shareholders
summary: Triveni Engineering shares appeared to fall sharply after trading ex-demerger, but the decline reflected a technical price adjustment following the separation of its power transmission business rather than selling pressure.

title: Global Market: Chinese stocks advance on AI, chip rally; Hong Kong shares slip
summary: Chinese mainland stocks advanced, led by gains in AI, semiconductor and metal shares, while Hong Kong equities declined as investors booked profits in technology stocks despite optimism over China's long-term earnings outlook.
